---
title: "Mary Lind, M.A."
---

### Hello!

My name is Mary, and I'm a 3rd year political science Ph.D. student at Binghamton University (SUNY). I primarily study the implications of emerging technologies for armed conflict and human rights, including things like cyber conflict, military technologies, and digital repression. My broader research interests also include violent non-state actors, disinformation, and human rights. On this website, you will find my CV and information about my academic research/publications, teaching, and other publications. I can also be reached via email at mlind to chat about research, teaching, and advice for current and prospective graduate students.
